result.stdout:
Usage: base64urls [command]
Usage: base64urls [--help] [--version]

base64urls

Commands:
  encode      encode input string to base64url. run this: base64urls encode "C# is awesome."
  decode      decode input base64url to string. run this: base64urls decode QyMgaXMgYXdlc29tZQ==
  escape      escape base64 to base64url. run this: base64urls escape "This+is/goingto+escape=="
  unescape    unescape base64url to base64. run this: base64urls unescape "This-is_goingto-escape"

Options:
  -h, --help    Show help message
  --version     Show version
